items.title: USC scientists discover a hidden Alzheimer’s trigger and a possible way to shut it down
items.summary: USC researchers have identified potential new drug compounds that may reduce the brain inflammation linked to Alzheimer’s disease, especially in people with the high-risk APOE4 gene. items.title: Eating more beans and soy could slash high blood pressure risk by nearly 30%
items.summary: Eating more beans, lentils, chickpeas, tofu, and other soy foods could be a surprisingly powerful way to fight high blood pressure. items.title: Scientists discover why some DNA-doubled cells refuse to die
items.summary: Scientists have uncovered a surprising twist in how cells behave when division goes wrong.
